visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up shot inside a refrigerated supermarket shelf. Multiple clear plastic containers of prepared noodles with shrimp and scallions are visible. A hand reaches into the frame and pulls one container out from the shelf. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor residential setting, likely a living room or kitchen. Two women are positioned in front of the camera, seen from the chest up. One woman on the left has long dark hair and wears a black top, while the woman on the right wears a white frilly blouse and a blue beret. They hold the large container of noodles toward the lens. (3) An animated graphic featuring characters from the Crayon Shin-chan series is overlaid on a close-up shot of the noodles. The characters appear to be interacting with the food. (4) Back to the live-action scene, the woman in the beret points enthusiastically at the noodles, highlighting specific ingredients like large shrimp and scallops. The woman in the black top begins eating from a smaller bowl using chopsticks. (5) The woman in the beret is shown in a closer shot holding a yellow squeeze bottle of Japanese mayonnaise, drizzling the sauce over a bowl of noodles. She then takes a large bite, her facial expression showing intense satisfaction, followed by both women giving a thumbs-up gesture to the camera.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 跑兩趟才買到!. [Variety]: 神級日式海陸炒麵. (2) [Subtitle]: 日式海陸炒麵. [Variety]: 跑了兩趟才比而買到的. (3) [Subtitle]: 這麼大份 一公斤只要394元. (4) [Subtitle]: 裡面有7隻大蝦 還有很多帆立貝. (5) [Variety]: 醬汁就是LOVE. (6) [Subtitle]: 這個炒麵真的是好厲害. (7) [Slogan]: 超級黑馬. [Variety]: 傷心喔~. (8) [Subtitle]: 就是再加上一點這個日式美乃滋.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and is wearing a black long-sleeved top. The other woman has dark hair and is wearing a blue beret and a white lace/frill top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts in a Costco refrigerated section with shelves full of food containers; transitions to a home interior with a table and shelves in the background containing plush toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy male introduction over an upbeat electronic dance track. A signature 'pop' sound effect marks the product reveal. (2) Two female voices engage in a rapid, highly enthusiastic dialogue about the food. The background music is a fast-paced major-mode electronic beat. (3) The track cuts suddenly to a Japanese vocal segment with a melodic, high-pitched female singer, typical of anime theme music. (4) The original electronic BGM returns with frequent 'ding' and 'whoosh' sound effects synchronized with visual text highlights. The female speakers maintain a high arousal level. (5) A squishing sound of a plastic bottle is clearly audible, followed by soft chewing sounds and a vocal expression of enjoyment. The video concludes with a fast-paced final recommendation in a joyful tone.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Ingredient Breakdown -> Taste Test -> Verdict
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a fast-paced, energetic product review of Costco's Japanese-style seafood and meat fried noodles. It aims to inform viewers about the product's value (price/weight), specific ingredients (shrimp, scallops), and taste quality to encourage a purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Implicit recommendation of a store-bought item within a personal vlog format.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes popular culture elements (Crayon Shin-chan) and high-density text to align with social media trends.
